name: Superior Bus Service
recent_news: Owner Meghan Smyth also co-founder/CEO of Charter.Tech (charter bus tech platform) per LinkedIn; suggests modernization focus.
fit_notes: Small independent PA charter/school-trip operator since 1982 with tech-savvy owner; very small (3 employees) so true tuck-in only — fleet/route density appear minimal, more charter than home-to-school contract.

name: A Plus Bus USA Corp
districts_or_customers: Miami-Dade County Public Schools (M-DCPS approved private bus company)
recent_news: Listed on 2025 M-DCPS approved private bus companies list; markets 25+ years experience across USA and South America.
fit_notes: M-DCPS-approved private bus contractor in Doral, but very small (4 employees) and skews to field trips/charters rather than recurring home-to-school routes; limited platform value for Summit beyond Miami foothold.

name: Francis Enterprises LLC
recent_news: Operates as FTS Limousine Service plus Francis Event Designs/Rentals/Planning — event/luxury limo business, not a school-bus contractor.
fit_notes: NOT a school-bus operator — luxury limo/event transportation and event-planning business. Not a Summit tuck-in target; remove from school-bus pipeline.

name: Luxury Limousine Svc
service_types: likely limousine/charter; possible special-needs/non-emergency transport per source list
recent_news: No web presence found; PO box address and limousine branding suggest small rural CA limo/charter operator rather than dedicated SPED school-bus contractor.
fit_notes: Likely NOT a school-bus operator — name and lack of web presence point to a small rural limousine/charter service in Lake County, CA. Low fit for Summit; flag for verification before any outreach.

name: Medic Express
districts_or_customers: Los Angeles / San Fernando Valley NEMT (Medi-Cal, dialysis, post-surgery)
recent_news: Operates from Reseda NEMT cluster (6860 Canby Ave) alongside other LA-area NEMT providers; no school transport footprint identified.
fit_notes: NEMT van operator, not a school-bus or SPED home-to-school contractor. Not a Summit tuck-in target; remove from school-bus pipeline.
